# requestSyncClock()

**Instance Method**

Synchronizes the camera’s clock with the computer’s clock.

## Declaration

```swift
func requestSyncClock()
```

## Discussion

Send this request only if the camera has the [doc://com.apple.imagecapturecore/documentation/ImageCaptureCore/ICDeviceCapability/cameraDeviceCanSyncClock] capability.

## Synchronizing the Clock

- **timeOffset**: The time offset, in seconds, between the camera’s clock and the computer’s clock.
